description: Style Note remanika combines edgy style with flattering fits in all their creations, including this trendy top. With excellent styling and a well designed look, this simple top will get the temperatures soaring when paired with a pair of shorts and flat strappy slip ons. Product Details Black sleeveless top, has a stand collar with ruffles and two buttons at the back with a keyhole opening below it, tiered ruffles around the right arm hole that extends diagonally across the front and back until the waist on the right side and then extends to form an external trail Material and Care Viscose Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and flat dry only Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size S
